<a id="index"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/index.html -->

<!-- page_index: 1 -->

# Commons Collections

The [Java Collections Framework](https://docs.oracle.com/javase/tutorial/collections/)
was a major addition in Java 1.2.
It added many powerful data structures that accelerate development of most significant Java applications.
Since that time it has become the recognised standard for collection handling in Java.

Commons-Collections seek to build upon the JDK classes by providing new interfaces, implementations and utilities.
There are many features, including:

- Bag interface for collections that have a number of copies of each object
- BidiMap interface for maps that can be looked up from value to key as well and key to value
- [Bloom filter](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/bloomFilters.html) classes and interfaces
- MapIterator interface to provide simple and quick iteration over maps
- Transforming decorators that alter each object as it is added to the collection
- Composite collections that make multiple collections look like one
- Ordered maps and sets that retain the order elements are added in, including an LRU based map
- Reference map that allows keys and/or values to be garbage collected under close control
- Many comparator implementations
- Many iterator implementations
- Adapter classes from array and enumerations to collections
- Utilities to test or create typical set-theory properties of collections such as union, intersection, and closure

# Documentation

A getting started [User's Guide](#userguide) is available
as are various [project reports](#project-reports).

The Javadoc API documents are available online:

- The [current release](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/apidocs/index.html)
- The latest 3.x release - [version 3.2.2](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/javadocs/api-3.2.2/index.html)
- The latest 2.x release - [version 2.1.1](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/javadocs/api-2.1.1/index.html)

The [source repository](#scm) can be
[browsed](https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf?p=commons-collections.git), and we have a mirror
on [GitHub](https://github.com/apache/commons-collections).

# Releases

The latest version is available:
[Download now!](https://commons.apache.org/collections/download_collections.cgi)

This requires Java 8 or later, see also the [release notes](https://commons.apache.org/changes.html).

For previous releases, see the [Apache Archive](https://archive.apache.org/dist/commons/collections/)

# Support

The [commons mailing lists](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/mail-lists.html) act as the main support forum.
The user list is suitable for most library usage queries.
The dev list is intended for the development discussion.
Please remember that the lists are shared between all commons components, so prefix your email by [collections].

Issues may be reported via [ASF JIRA](https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-collections/issue-tracking.html).
Please read the instructions carefully to submit a useful bug report or enhancement request.

---

<h2>Release History</h2>

<th>Version</th>
<th>Date</th>
<th>Description</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.5.0">4.5.0</a></td>
<td>2025-04-19</td>
<td>This is a feature and maintenance release. Java 8 or later is required.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.5.0-m3">4.5.0-M3</a></td>
<td>2024-12-15</td>
<td>This is a feature and maintenance release. Java 8 or later is required.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.5.0-m2">4.5.0-M2</a></td>
<td>2024-06-15</td>
<td>This milestone release requires Java 8 and adds the package `org.apache.commons.collections4.bloomfilter`.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.5.0-m1">4.5.0-M1</a></td>
<td>2024-03-31</td>
<td>This milestone release requires Java 8 and adds the package `org.apache.commons.collections4.bloomfilter` for review.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.4">4.4</a></td>
<td>2019-07-05</td>
<td>Maintenance release.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.3">4.3</a></td>
<td>2018-12-21</td>
<td>Update from Java 7 to Java 8, bug fixes, and small changes.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.2">4.2</a></td>
<td>2018-07-11</td>
<td>Update from Java 6 to Java 7, bug fixes, and small changes.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.1">4.1</a></td>
<td>2015-11-28</td>
<td>This is a security and minor release.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a4.0">4.0</a></td>
<td>2013-11-27</td>
<td>This is a major release: It combines bug fixes, new features and changes to existing features.  Most notable changes are: use of generics and other language features introduced in Java 5 (varargs, Iterable), removed deprecated classes / methods and features which are now supported by the JDK, replaced Buffer interface with java.util.Queue, added concept of split maps with respective interfaces Put / Get (see also package splitmap), added new Trie interface together with an implementation of a Patricia Trie.  Because of the base package name change, this release can be used together with earlier versions of Commons Collections. The minimal version of the Java platform required to compile and use Commons Collections is Java 5. Users are encouraged to upgrade to this version as, in addition to new features, this release includes numerous bug fixes.</td></tr>
<tr>
<td><a href="#changes--a3.2.2">3.2.2</a></td>
<td>2015-11-15</td>
<td>This is a security and bugfix release.</td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a4.5.0"></a>

<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Refactor ExtendedIterator and FilterIterator with a new interface IteratorOperations. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>

<tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a4.5.0-M2"></a>
<h2>Release 4.5.0-M2 – 2024-06-15</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add layered Bloom filter clean method #476. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-852">COLLECTIONS-852</a>. Thanks to Claude Warren, Alex Herbert.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Deprecate Lists incompatible with Java 21, add new variant of AbstractLinkedList #485. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-842">COLLECTIONS-842</a>. Thanks to Julian Reschke.</td>
<td><a href="#team--aherbert">aherbert</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate Closure in favor of java.util.function.Consumer. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate Factory in favor of java.util.function.Supplier. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate Predicate in favor of java.util.function.Predicate. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate Transformer in favor of java.util.function.Function. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Change LayerManager to use List and added generics to LayerdedBloomFilter #481. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-853">COLLECTIONS-853</a>. Thanks to Claude Warren, Alex Herbert, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--aherbert">aherbert</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD UselessOverridingMethod in PropertiesFactory.EmptyProperties. Thanks to PMD, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD UnnecessaryFullyQualifiedName in AbstractHashedMap. Thanks to PMD, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD UnnecessaryFullyQualifiedName in AbstractLinkedMap. Thanks to PMD, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD UnnecessaryFullyQualifiedName in CaseInsensitiveMap. Thanks to PMD, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Renaming bloomfilter components and methods as per ticket #492. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-854">COLLECTIONS-854</a>. Thanks to Claude Warren, Alex Herbert, Gary Gregory.</td>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a4.5.0-M1"></a>
<h2>Release 4.5.0-M1 – 2024-03-31</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use assertThrows V2. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-780">COLLECTIONS-780</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use assertThrows. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-778">COLLECTIONS-778</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix flaky AbstractMultiValuedMapTest#testToString. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-771">COLLECTIONS-771</a>. Thanks to Xin Tong.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>

<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Refine Javadoc and fix typos. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-764">COLLECTIONS-764</a>. Thanks to XenoAmess.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Update Javadoc of ListIteratorWrapper#remove. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-765">COLLECTIONS-765</a>. Thanks to Tobias Kiecker.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add hashCode method to CollectionUtils that supports an equator parameter. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-708">COLLECTIONS-708</a>. Thanks to dota17.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix checkstyle issues regarding missing newline at end of file, and CRLF vs LF. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-759">COLLECTIONS-759</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>A potential misleading comment #82. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-727">COLLECTIONS-727</a>. Thanks to XiangzheXu, XZ-X.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Using existing class in example given in Javadocs. #85. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-679">COLLECTIONS-679</a>. Thanks to David Mollitor, Mikko Maunu.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add test cases to IteratorUtilsTest #86. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-729">COLLECTIONS-729</a>. Thanks to dota17.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix typos in release notes and Javadoc for AbstractHashedMap and AbstractHashedMapTest #88. Thanks to dota17.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add missing @throws comment for SwitchTransformer.switchTransformer. #124. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-740">COLLECTIONS-740</a>. Thanks to Pengyu Nie.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix inconsistent @throws comments in DefaultedMap #123. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-739">COLLECTIONS-739</a>. Thanks to Pengyu Nie.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix links to release notes and update contents for 4.4 #127. Thanks to Dominik Stadler.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix checkstyle syntax (was scope, is now accessModifiers) via PR #235. Thanks to Jin Xu.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PassiveExpiringMap documentation for methods that involve accessing the entire map. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-786">COLLECTIONS-786</a>. Thanks to vandrewskis.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SortedProperties should sort entrySet() as well as keys() #256. Thanks to Michael Berry.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SetUniqueList.createSetBasedOnList doesn't add list elements to return value. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-796">COLLECTIONS-796</a>. Thanks to Clemens Kurz.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>UnmodifiableNavigableSet can be modified by pollFirst() and pollLast(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-799">COLLECTIONS-799</a>. Thanks to Stefano Cordio.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use Java 8 and method reference. #274. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use Java 8 features #228. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-788">COLLECTIONS-788</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Upgraded org.junit.Test to org.junit.jupiter.api.Test #295, #304. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-807">COLLECTIONS-807</a>. Thanks to Pradeesh Kumar, samabcde.</td>

<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>

<tr>

<tr>

<td>Use java.lang.Objects#equals; eliminate a couple of nulls #307. Thanks to Steve Bosman.</td>

<tr>

<tr>

<tr>

<tr>

<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>

<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Migrate Map tests to JUnit 5 assertions #391. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-839">COLLECTIONS-839</a>. Thanks to Sam Ng, Gary Gregory, Bruno P. Kinoshita.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix links in Javadoc and documentations #325. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-835">COLLECTIONS-835</a>. Thanks to Marc Wrobel.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Correct test of Collection toArray(Object[]) vs toArray() to optionally ignore array order.
      Ordering is not specified for some collections such as Bags. Thanks to Partha Protim Paul.</td>
<td><a href="#team--aherbert">aherbert</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Correct test of BidiMap to optionally ignore testing the key set matches the values order.
      Ordering is not specified for some BidiMaps such as DualHashBidiMaps. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-836">COLLECTIONS-836</a>. Thanks to Anant Dahiya.</td>
<td><a href="#team--aherbert">aherbert</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Return 0 immediately if the given iterable is null in IterableUtils#size. Update tests. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-737">COLLECTIONS-737</a>. Thanks to Prodigysov.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>JavaDoc for FixedSizeList should warn that modifying underlying list is still allowed and is not prevented. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-697">COLLECTIONS-697</a>. Thanks to Ranjan George.</td>
<td><a href="#team--eax">eax</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fill in some map test cases #104. Thanks to dota17.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Remove the redundant assertNull in IterableUtilsTest.find and update Javadocs. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-738">COLLECTIONS-738</a>. Thanks to Pengyu Nie.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Simplify two remove-if loops #77. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-724">COLLECTIONS-724</a>. Thanks to Eitan Adler.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<td>Fix inconsistent @throws comments in ListOrderedSet #125. Thanks to Chen.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>

<tr>

<td>Bump maven-pmd-plugin from 3.12.0 to 3.19.0 #167, #196, #253, #311, #334. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional commons-codec:commons-codec from 1.14 to 1.16.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons.junit.version from 5.6.2 to 5.8.2 #181 #213 #236 #252 #254 #268. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump maven-antrun-plugin from 1.8 to 3.1.0 #170, #303. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-774">COLLECTIONS-774</a>. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump maven-checkstyle-plugin from 3.1.1 to 3.1.2 #211. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Migrate assert to Assertions #209. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-779">COLLECTIONS-779</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add and use CollectionUtils.INDEX_NOT_FOUND constant. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-781">COLLECTIONS-781</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-lang3 from 3.11 to 3.14.0. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add new variables to oac.collections4.CollectionUtils and use them in the code base. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-785">COLLECTIONS-785</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump easymock from 4.2 to 4.3 #226. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump maven-pmd-plugin from 3.15.0 to 3.16.0 #286. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-parent from 52 to 58 #299, #368, #373, #393. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump japicmp from 0.15.4 to 0.16.0. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump pmd from 6.46.0 to 6.52.0 #318, #327, #333, #347. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump guava-testlib from 31.1-jre to 33.1.0-jre #394, #395, #404, #405, #411, #423, #438, #462. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a4.4"></a>
<h2>Release 4.4 – 2019-07-05</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>NullPointerExceptions in CompositeCollection, CompositeSet, and CompositeMap. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-710">COLLECTIONS-710</a>. Thanks to Yu Shi, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Implement Collection's removeIf(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-715">COLLECTIONS-715</a>. Thanks to morningmemo, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fix LRUMap exception message. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-718">COLLECTIONS-718</a>. Thanks to Eitan Adler.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Create a PropertiesFactory and SortedPropertiesFactory. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-719">COLLECTIONS-719</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Support Transformer for LazyList #52. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-719">COLLECTIONS-719</a>. Thanks to Stephan Windmüller, Bruno P. Kinoshita.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Make use of FunctionalInterface #48. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-723">COLLECTIONS-723</a>. Thanks to Eitan Adler, SOC, Bruno P. Kinoshita.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Don't include email address in Exception messages. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-716">COLLECTIONS-716</a>. Thanks to Sebb.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a4.3"></a>
<h2>Release 4.3 – 2018-12-21</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use boolean operator for boolean result. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-691">COLLECTIONS-691</a>. Thanks to Eitan Adler.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update platform requirement from Java 7 to 8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-688">COLLECTIONS-688</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Link to Javadoc API broken. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-689">COLLECTIONS-689</a>. Thanks to Richard Walker.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Replace use of deprecated Class#newInstance() PR #49. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-692">COLLECTIONS-692</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory, Eitan Adler.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>AbstractReferenceMap made easier for subclassing; PR #51. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-696">COLLECTIONS-696</a>. Thanks to Maxim Solodovnik.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>StackOverflowError in SetUniqueList.add() when it receives itself. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-701">COLLECTIONS-701</a>. Thanks to Shin Hong, Don Jeba.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The PassiveExpiringMap#put() method should return the previous record only if not expired. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-703">COLLECTIONS-703</a>. Thanks to Tomas Tulka.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Add SetUtils.unmodifiableSet(T... items) method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-706">COLLECTIONS-706</a>. Thanks to Richard Eckart de Castilho, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>MultiSet.Entry::getCount() isn't 0 after removing the last element. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-709">COLLECTIONS-709</a>. Thanks to Robert Wertman.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a4.2"></a>
<h2>Release 4.2 – 2018-07-11</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add test for MultiSetUtils. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-681">COLLECTIONS-681</a>. Thanks to Stephan Fuhrmann.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>HashEntry array object naming data initialized with double the size during deserialization. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-599">COLLECTIONS-599</a>. Thanks to Tejas Patel, Saleem Akbar, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Unit tests MapUtilsTest and ListIteratorWrapperTest no longer fail on Java 9. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-662">COLLECTIONS-662</a>. Thanks to Vamsi Kavuri.</td>
<td><a href="#team--chtompki">chtompki</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Intermittent test failures in Windows for HashSetValuedHashMap. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-661">COLLECTIONS-661</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Uncomment test in AbstractMapTest regarding LRUMap equals. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-660">COLLECTIONS-660</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add Automatic-Module-Name MANIFEST entry for Java 9 compatibility. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-658">COLLECTIONS-658</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--britter">britter</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix site build on Java 8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-656">COLLECTIONS-656</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Update Javadoc to Build on Java 1.8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-653">COLLECTIONS-653</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Build status, Coverage status and Maven central weren't in README.md. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-606">COLLECTIONS-606</a>. Thanks to Vamsi Kavuri.</td>
<td><a href="#team--chtompki">chtompki</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improve efficiency of DefaultedMap.get. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-602">COLLECTIONS-602</a>. Thanks to John Mark.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Small improvements for generics, conditional statements, and warnings suppressions. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-603">COLLECTIONS-603</a>. Thanks to Artem Konovalov.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update platform from Java 6 to Java 7. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-655">COLLECTIONS-655</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Web site spelling error: MultiValuedMapeList. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-594">COLLECTIONS-594</a>. Thanks to Javen O'Neal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Correction of Javadoc for org.apache.commons.collections4.functors.CatchAndRethrowClosure. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-597">COLLECTIONS-597</a>. Thanks to Enrique.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add null-safe MapUtils.size(Map&lt;?, ?&gt;) method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-589">COLLECTIONS-589</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PatriciaTrie prefixMap clear throws NullPointerException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-586">COLLECTIONS-586</a>. Thanks to Shailender Bathula, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add class SortedProperties to sort keys. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-654">COLLECTIONS-654</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.collections4.ListUtils.union(List, List) should pre-allocate result list. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-666">COLLECTIONS-666</a>. Thanks to BELUGA BEHR.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils.addAll(Collection&lt;C&gt;, C[]) to addAll(Collection&lt;C&gt;, C...). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-669">COLLECTIONS-669</a>. Thanks to BELUGA BEHR, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add CollectionUtils containsAny method for primitive array: org.apache.commons.collections4.CollectionUtils.containsAny(Collection&lt;?&gt;, T...). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-668">COLLECTIONS-668</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Synchronized queue wrapper in QueueUtils. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-575">COLLECTIONS-575</a>. Thanks to Guram Savinov, Grzegorz Rożniecki, Bruno P. Kinoshita, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.collections4.IteratorUtils.first(Iterator). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-670">COLLECTIONS-670</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.collections4.IterableUtils.first(Iterable). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-671">COLLECTIONS-671</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The verification of unsupported iterator methods is not complete. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-678">COLLECTIONS-678</a>. Thanks to Oscar Luis Vera Pérez.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ListUtils.partition potential integer overflow. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-673">COLLECTIONS-673</a>. Thanks to John Mark, Stephan Fuhrmann.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a4.1"></a>
<h2>Release 4.1 – 2015-11-28</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new interfaces "MultiValuedMap", "ListValuedMap" and "SetValuedMap"
      as a replacement for "MultiMap". Decorators and implementations reside in
      the "multimap" package and a "MultiMapUtils" class has been added.
      The existing interface "MultiMap" as well as the concrete implementation
      "MultiValueMap" has been deprecated. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-508">COLLECTIONS-508</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Deprecated various method in "CollectionUtils" in favor of similar
      methods in the newly introduced "IterableUtils". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-551">COLLECTIONS-551</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Serialization support for unsafe classes in the functor package
      has been removed as this can be exploited for remote code execution
      attacks. Classes considered to be unsafe are: CloneTransformer,
      ForClosure, InstantiateFactory, InstantiateTransformer, InvokerTransformer,
      PrototypeCloneFactory, PrototypeSerializationFactory, WhileClosure. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-580">COLLECTIONS-580</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added validation when de-serializing a "MultiValueMap#ReflectionFactory":
      only Collection classes are allowed, otherwise an UnsupportedOperationException
      will be thrown during de-serialization. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-580">COLLECTIONS-580</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new MultiSet interface which is intended to be a replacement for
      the Bag interface. The main difference is that a MultiSet is fully compatible
      to the Collection contract. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-567">COLLECTIONS-567</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Subclasses of MultiKey did not re-calculate their hashcode after de-serialization. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-576">COLLECTIONS-576</a>. Thanks to Stephan Roch.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added set operations to "SetUtils": union, difference, intersection and disjunction.
      The operations return a view of the result that is backed by the input sets. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-572">COLLECTIONS-572</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>All constructors and static factory methods will now throw a "NullPointerException" if
      a required input argument is null. Previously sometimes a "IllegalArgumentException" was used. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-570">COLLECTIONS-570</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Deprecated methods "synchronizedCollection(Collection)" and "unmodifiableCollection(Collection)"
      in class "CollectionUtils", the corresponding methods in "java.util.Collections" should be used instead. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-571">COLLECTIONS-571</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>"IteratorUtils#collate(...)" methods did not use natural ordering when a
      null comparator was provided. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-566">COLLECTIONS-566</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support to specify the initial size of a "LRUMap". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-557">COLLECTIONS-557</a>. Thanks to Philippe Mouawad.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added decorators for "NavigableSet" interface. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-565">COLLECTIONS-565</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new class "FluentIterable" to support a fluent API for manipulating
      Iterable instances. Additionally various supporting methods have been
      added to "IterableUtils" and "IteratorUtils". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-464,COLLECTIONS-442">COLLECTIONS-464,COLLECTIONS-442</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new "ZippingIterator" and factory methods "IteratorUtils#zippingIterator(...)". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-464">COLLECTIONS-464</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new decorator "SkippingIterator" and factory methods "IteratorUtils#skippingIterator(...)". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-464">COLLECTIONS-464</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added method "SetUtils#newIdentityHashSet()" which returns a new identity HashSet
      using reference-equality instead of object-equality. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-556">COLLECTIONS-556</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Upgraded minimum java requirement to Java 6 (up from Java 5). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-562">COLLECTIONS-562</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added method "LRUMap#get(Object, boolean)" that allows to query the map
      without affecting the least recently used order. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-395">COLLECTIONS-395</a>. Thanks to David Hawthorne.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Changed return type of "ListOrderedSet#remove(int)" from Object to the generic type parameter. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-558">COLLECTIONS-558</a>. Thanks to Felix Rabe.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added clarification to Javadoc of "TreeBag#add(Object)" wrt null arguments. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-555">COLLECTIONS-555</a>. Thanks to M Kim.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added "toString(...)" methods to newly created "IterableUtils" and existing "IteratorUtils"
      to get a string representation of an Iterable/Iterator instance similar to "Arrays#toString(...)". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-427">COLLECTIONS-427</a>. Thanks to Gonçalo Marques.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reverted performance improvement for "SetUniqueList#retainAll(Collection)"
      introduced in 4.0. Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity instead. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-427">COLLECTIONS-427</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reverted performance improvement for "ListOrderedSet#retainAll(Collection)"
      introduced in 4.0. Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity instead. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-426">COLLECTIONS-426</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added a Builder for "PredicatedCollection". Elements added to the builder
      that fail the predicate will not throw an IllegalArgumentException. The builder
      supports creating predicated lists, bags, sets and queues. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-530">COLLECTIONS-530</a>. Thanks to Erik.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Documented runtime complexity of "CollectionUtils#removeAll(Collection, Collection). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-545">COLLECTIONS-545</a>. Thanks to Oswaldo Olivo.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>"AbstractCollectionDecorator" doesn't forward equals and hashCode anymore. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-543">COLLECTIONS-543</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Documented runtime complexity of "CollectionUtils#retainAll(Collection, Collection). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-544">COLLECTIONS-544</a>. Thanks to Oswaldo Olivo.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>"AbstractHashedMap" still inherits from "AbstractMap", contrary to what
      the class Javadoc stated. The inheritance will now be removed in v5.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-542">COLLECTIONS-542</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Changed scope of "CircularFifoQueue#isAtFullCapacity()" to public. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-539">COLLECTIONS-539</a>. Thanks to Guram Savinov.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The map returned by "PatriciaTrie#prefixMap()" did not contain all keys
      that are prefixed by the given search key in some rare cases. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-525">COLLECTIONS-525</a>. Thanks to Zigler Zhang.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new methods "IterableUtils#partition(...)" to partition an input collection
      into separate output collections based on evaluation of one or more predicates. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-511">COLLECTIONS-511</a>. Thanks to Nathan Blomquist, Brent Worden.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Harmonized signature of factory methods for functor-related classes which take
      a collection as input with their array counterparts. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-537">COLLECTIONS-537</a>. Thanks to Frank Jakop.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added overloaded method "CollectionUtils#get(Enumeration, int)" and simplified
      code for "CollectionUtils#get(Object, int)". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-540">COLLECTIONS-540</a>. Thanks to Daniel Stewart, Issam El Atif.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved check for null input in "MapUtils#putAll(Map, Object[])". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-536">COLLECTIONS-536</a>. Thanks to Tagir Valeev.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity of "CollectionBag#retainAll". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-534">COLLECTIONS-534</a>. Thanks to Oswaldo Olivo.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added methods "removeAll(...)" and "retainAll(...)" to "CollectionUtils" that perform
      equality checks using the provided "Equator" object instead of "Object#equals()". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-529">COLLECTIONS-529</a>. Thanks to Alexander Muthmann, Dipanjan Laha.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use correct type bounds in
      "CollectionUtils#isEqualCollection(Collection, Collection, Equator)" to
      prevent a "ClassCastException" at runtime for invalid inputs. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-531">COLLECTIONS-531</a>. Thanks to Dipanjan Laha.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Removed unneeded private method in "PassiveExpiringMap". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-523">COLLECTIONS-523</a>. Thanks to Thiago Andrade.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added clarification to the Javadoc of "MapUtils#toProperties(Map)" in case
      of null keys/values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-516">COLLECTIONS-516</a>. Thanks to Cyrille Artho.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>"ListOrderedSet#listOrderedSet(List)" did not remove duplicates from the
      input list as advertised in the Javadoc. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-524">COLLECTIONS-524</a>. Thanks to J Goodfellow.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>"MultiKeyMap" was throwing a "NullPointerException" for various operations
      if two key arguments have been used and the second was "null". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-521">COLLECTIONS-521</a>. Thanks to Maxime Nay.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Updated code example for "PredicatedList". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-522">COLLECTIONS-522</a>. Thanks to Erik.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>"TransformingComparator" and "FixedOrderComparator" did not comply with
      the contract of "Object#equals". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-512">COLLECTIONS-512</a>. Thanks to Cyrille Artho.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix compilation errors when using source level 1.8 and a recent java 8 compiler. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-510">COLLECTIONS-510</a>. Thanks to Hollis Waite.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Clarified Javadoc of "CollectionBag" wrt changes from the original Bag interface. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-509">COLLECTIONS-509</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Removed wrong type bounds for "ComparatorUtils#chainedComparator(...)". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-507">COLLECTIONS-507</a>. Thanks to Gerson.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added Javadoc clarification to class "CollectionUtils" that input objects which
      override "Object#equals(Object)" must also maintain the general contract of
      "Object#hashCode()" as various utility methods take advantage of sets/maps/bags. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-506">COLLECTIONS-506</a>. Thanks to Anthony Communier.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new transformer "IfTransformer" and factory methods "TransformerUtils#ifTransformer(...)"
      which replace "TransformerUtils#switchTransformer(Predicate, Transformer, Transformer)". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-503">COLLECTIONS-503</a>. Thanks to Josh Cain.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new decorator "BoundedIterator" and factory methods "IteratorUtils#boundedIterator(...)". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-471">COLLECTIONS-471</a>. Thanks to Radford Tam.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a4.0"></a>
<h2>Release 4.0 – 2013-11-27</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Resolved generic parameter inconsistency for various static fields, e.g. BagUtils.EMPTY_BAG,
      TruePredicate.INSTANCE and many others. All accessible static fields use raw types so that
      they can be used directly without explicit casting. To avoid compiler warnings about unchecked
      conversion and/or rawtypes use the corresponding factory methods, e.g. BagUtils.emptyBag(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-502">COLLECTIONS-502</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Renamed methods "V MultiKeyMap#remove(Object, Object, ...)" to
      "V MultiKeyMap#removeMultiKey(Object, Object, ...)" to avoid future conflicts
      with a default method of the Map interface in Java 8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-501">COLLECTIONS-501</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Renamed "V MultiMap#remove(K, V)" to "boolean MultiMap#removeMapping(K, V)"
      to avoid future conflicts with a default method of the Map interface in Java 8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-500">COLLECTIONS-500</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Refactored the test framework for Bag implementations to extend from
      "AbstractCollectionTest" by decorating the concrete Bag instance with
      a CollectionBag or CollectionSortedBag. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-499">COLLECTIONS-499</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>"CollectionBag" will now also respect the contract of the decorated bag in case
      a null argument is provided to either removeAll or retainAll. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-498">COLLECTIONS-498</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added bag decorator "CollectionSortedBag" which decorates a SortedBag to make it
      comply with the Collection contract. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-497">COLLECTIONS-497</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>"UnmodifiableBoundedCollection" does now also implement the marker interface "Unmodifiable"
      similar as all other unmodifiable decorators. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-496">COLLECTIONS-496</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>"UnmodifiableTrie#unmodifiableTrie(Trie)" will not decorate again an already
      unmodifiable Trie. Also the return type has been changed to "Trie" to be consistent
      with other Unmodifiable decorators. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-495">COLLECTIONS-495</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Moved "Equator" interface to base package for consistency. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-494">COLLECTIONS-494</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added "CollectionsUtils#matchesAll(Iterable, Predicate)" to test if all elements
      of a collection match a given predicate. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-488">COLLECTIONS-488</a>. Thanks to Josh Cain.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Accept wildcard input where possible, e.g. in copy-constructors, Unmodifiable* decorators
      and iterators. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-485">COLLECTIONS-485</a>. Thanks to Hollis Waite.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>No collision detection/resolution was performed when calling "CompositeSet#addComposited(...)"
      with more than one Set as argument. Additionally use varargs parameters instead of arrays
      in CompositeSet and CompositeCollection constructor and addComposited method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-481">COLLECTIONS-481</a>. Thanks to Hollis Waite.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Narrow return type of "BidiMap#values()" to Set as the values are required to be unique. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-480">COLLECTIONS-480</a>. Thanks to Hollis Waite.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed conversion of timeout parameters in "PassiveExpiringMap". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-475">COLLECTIONS-475</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Exception in "ListOrderedMap#putAll" if map contains null values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-474">COLLECTIONS-474</a>. Thanks to Ning Chen.</td>
<td><a href="#team--sebb">sebb</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Made field "collection" in class "AbstractCollectionDecorator" private and added
      setter "setCollection(Collection)" with scope protected to set the decorated collection
      during de-serialization. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-473">COLLECTIONS-473</a>. Thanks to sebb.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "AbstractMapBag#containsAll(Collection)" by returning immediately
      after a difference has been found. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-472">COLLECTIONS-472</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Renamed class "TransformedMap" in package "splitmap" to "TransformedSplitMap" to avoid
      name clash with similar class in package "map". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-470">COLLECTIONS-470</a>. Thanks to sebb.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added bag decorator "CollectionBag" which decorates a bag to make it comply with the
      Collection contract. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-468">COLLECTIONS-468</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Replaced "Collection" with "Iterable" for method arguments where applicable. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-466">COLLECTIONS-466</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added "PushbackIterator" decorator to support pushback of elements during iteration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-463">COLLECTIONS-463</a>. Thanks to Andy Seaborne, Claude Warren.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added "PeekingIterator" decorator to support one-element lookahead during iteration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-462">COLLECTIONS-462</a>. Thanks to Andy Seaborne, Claude Warren.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added additional clarification to Javadoc of interface "Put" wrt return type of
      "put(Object, Object)" method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-461">COLLECTIONS-461</a>. Thanks to Matt Benson, sebb.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Changed "IteratorChain" to use internally a "Queue" instead of a "List". Iterators are
      removed from the queue once used and can be garbage collected after being exhausted.
      Additionally removed the methods "setIterator(Iterator)" and "getIterators()". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-460">COLLECTIONS-460</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Removed method "setArray(Object)" in class ArrayIterator and method "setArray(Object[])"
      in class ObjectArrayIterator and made fields array, startIndex and endIndex final. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-459">COLLECTIONS-459</a>. Thanks to sebb.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_7f9c320d5dd037d3.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>Removed unused class "AbstractUntypedCollectionDecorator&lt;E, D&gt;". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-458">COLLECTIONS-458</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--sebb">sebb</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added methods "ListUtils#longestCommonSubsequence(...)" to get the longest common subsequence
      of arbitrary lists or CharSequences. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-456">COLLECTIONS-456</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Changed scope of fields to private where appropriate. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-455">COLLECTIONS-455</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--sebb">sebb</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>An iterator over a "Flat3Map#entrySet()" will now return
      independent Map.Entry objects that will not change anymore when
      the iterator progresses. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-454">COLLECTIONS-454</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Several closure and transformer implementations in the functors package
      will now copy an array as input to their constructor (e.g. ChainedClosure). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-453">COLLECTIONS-453</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Change base package to org.apache.commons.collections4. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-452">COLLECTIONS-452</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The constructors for all Utils classes are now private to prevent instantiation. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-451">COLLECTIONS-451</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added methods "forAllButLastDo(Collection, Closure)" and "forAllButLastDo(Iterator, Closure)"
      to class "CollectionUtils". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-450">COLLECTIONS-450</a>. Thanks to J. Moldawski.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Tree traversal with a TreeListIterator will not be affected anymore by
      the removal of an element directly after a call to previous(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-447">COLLECTIONS-447</a>. Thanks to Jeffrey Barnes.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added method "CollectionUtils#isEqualCollection(Collection, Collection, Equator)". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-446">COLLECTIONS-446</a>. Thanks to Matt Lachman.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Adapt and/or ignore several unit tests when run on an IBM J9 VM (specification version 1.6.0)
      due to a faulty "java.util.TreeMap" implementation. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-445">COLLECTIONS-445</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SetUniqueList.set(int, E) now works correctly if the object to be inserted
      is already placed at the given position. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-444">COLLECTIONS-444</a>. Thanks to Thomas Vahrst, John Vasileff.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>MultiKeyMap.clone() now correctly calls super.clone(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-441">COLLECTIONS-441</a>. Thanks to Thomas Vahrst.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added "emptyIfNull" methods to classes "CollectionUtils", "ListUtils", "SetUtils"
      and "MapUtils". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-436">COLLECTIONS-436</a>. Thanks to Arman Sharif.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improve performance of "TreeList#addAll" and "TreeList(Collection)" by converting
      the input collection into an AVL tree and efficiently merge it into the existing tree. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-433">COLLECTIONS-433</a>. Thanks to Jeffrey Barnes.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Replaced "Buffer" interface with "java.util.Queue". Kept "CircularFifoQueue"
      as well as "Predicated", "Transformed" and "Unmodifiable" decorators. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-432">COLLECTIONS-432</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added method "CollectionUtils#containsAll(Collection, Collection)" with guaranteed
      runtime complexity of O(n + m) and space complexity of O(n). This method may yield much
      better performance than "Collection#containsAll(Collection)" depending on the use-case and
      type of collection used. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-429,COLLECTIONS-434">COLLECTIONS-429,COLLECTIONS-434</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor, Mert Guldur.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed performance issue in "SetUniqueList#retainAll" method for large collections. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-427">COLLECTIONS-427</a>. Thanks to Mert Guldur.</td>
<td><a href="#team--brentworden">brentworden</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed performance issue in "ListOrderedSet#retainAll" method for large collections. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-426">COLLECTIONS-426</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--brentworden">brentworden</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "ListOrderedMap#remove(Object)" method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-425">COLLECTIONS-425</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_f3d392c27550ec36.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>"CompositeSet" does not inherit from "CompositeCollection" anymore. The inner class
      "SetMutator" has been updated accordingly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-424">COLLECTIONS-424</a>. Thanks to Michael Pradel.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added method "CollectionUtils#permutations(Collection)" and class "PermutationIterator"
      to generate unordered permutations of a collection. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-422">COLLECTIONS-422</a>. Thanks to Benoit Corne.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Update Javadoc for "ListUtils#lazyList()" and "ListUtils#fixedSizeList()". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-421">COLLECTIONS-421</a>. Thanks to Benedikt Ritter.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity of "AbstractDualBidiMap#retainAll". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-419">COLLECTIONS-419</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity of "AbstractLinkedList#retainAll". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-417">COLLECTIONS-417</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Added clarifying Javadoc wrt runtime complexity of "AbstractLinkedList#removeAll". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-415">COLLECTIONS-415</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed several compilation issues with older Java 1.6 compilers. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-414">COLLECTIONS-414</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "removeAll()" method for sets returned by "DualHashBidiMap#entrySet()". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-413">COLLECTIONS-413</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "CollectionUtils#subtract" methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-412">COLLECTIONS-412</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed possible "IndexOutOfBoundsException" in "ListOrderedMap#putAll". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-411">COLLECTIONS-411</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "SetUniqueList#addAll" method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-410">COLLECTIONS-410</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "ListOrderedSet#addAll" method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-409">COLLECTIONS-409</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "SetUniqueList#removeAll". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-408">COLLECTIONS-408</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "ListOrderedSet#remove(Object)" in case the object is
      not contained in the Set. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-407">COLLECTIONS-407</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_4a691bebe5f8bb38.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved performance of "ListUtils#subtract" method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-406">COLLECTIONS-406</a>. Thanks to Adrian Nistor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--tn">tn</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added "ListUtils#select" and "ListUtils#selectRejected" methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-405">COLLECTIONS-405</a>. Thanks to Adam Dyga.</td>
<td><a href="#team--brentworden">brentworden</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_833d51a6c4928afd.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added an implementation of Eugene Myers difference algorithm in package
      o.a.c.c.sequence. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/COLLECTIONS-404">COLLECTIONS-404</a>. Thanks to Jordane Sarda.</td>
<td><a href="#team--luc">luc</a></td></tr>
<tr>
